title: session.open
description: Open a new session or reattach an existing one under a (profile, agent). With `resume:true` the daemon rehydrates the agent session via ACP session/load (#23) and may replay missed frames with seq > last_seen_seq. Defaults to profile/agent `default`/`default`.

resume.description: Reattach an existing session (rehydrate model context, replay events).

last_seen_seq.description: Highest seq the client has observed; the daemon replays buffered frames with a greater seq. Omit to skip replay.

agent.description: Agent within the profile; defaults to the profile's `default`/sole agent.

alias.description: Optional human-friendly identifier for the session.
